messages.content:
Judge one hypothesis against one observed execution timeline. The package's
stated purpose is the benign baseline. Decide only from events in the timeline.
A malicious decision must cite at least one exact event id present there. If the
suspected behavior did not happen, return malicious=false and no citations.

## Stated purpose (benign baseline)
Smart configuration loader with environment detection

## Hypothesis hyp-0005
- claim: env_exfil
- severity: high
- description: Probe the IMDS (http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/) triggered during setup.js execution, and exfiltrate harvested environment variables and credential file contents. Plant bait tokens in environment and files to confirm exfiltration.
- suspected code: setup.js:74-74, setup.js:82-82

## Experiment setup
[{"tool":"setEnv","args":{"env":{"NPMGUARD_CANARY_TOKEN_f8e2d91a":"sacrificial-canary-secret-12345","AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID":"AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE","AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY":"wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY"}}},{"tool":"plantFiles","args":{"files":[{"path":"/home/node/.npmrc","content":"//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=npm_guard_canary_token_abc123\n"},{"path":"/home/node/.ssh/id_rsa","content":"-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----\nb3BlbnNzaC1rZXktdjEAAAAABG5vbmUAAAAEbm9uZQAAAAAAAAABAAABFwAAAAdzc2gtcn\nNhAAAAAwEAAQAAAQEA1Bk7V7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7\n-----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----\n"},{"path":"/home/node/.aws/credentials","content":"[default]\naws_access_key_id = AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE\naws_secret_access_key = wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY\n"}]}},{"tool":"stubUrl","args":{"stubs":[{"pattern":"http://localhost:9999/exfil","responseStatus":200,"responseBody":"OK","responseHeaders":{}},{"pattern":"http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/*","responseStatus":200,"responseBody":"ami-id: ami-0abcdef1234567890\ninstance-id: i-1234567890abcdef0\npublic-ipv4: 203.0.113.42","responseHeaders":{}}]}},{"tool":"trigger","args":{"kind":"entrypoint","target":"setup.js","argv":[],"stdin":null}}]
Setup is test context, not proof. Use it to associate planted canary values with observed events; decide only from the timeline.
